steps.title: Identify the types of subjects Lewis created
steps.content: Text 1 emphasizes Lewis's reputation for historical and mythological sculptures, but explicitly notes “Although Lewis sculpted other subjects.” Text 2 specifies those other subjects as portrait busts, which she created frequently throughout her career.

steps.title: Match the subjects to the choices
steps.content: D directly captures the subject variety both texts establish—the historical and mythological figures from Text 1, plus the portrait busts from Text 2. A incorrectly claims busts overshadowed this work; B makes an unsupported “most famous” claim; C addresses trends not discussed. That matches choice D — D is correct.
